title: Bohemian Rattan Pouf Ottoman
description: Add flexible, lightweight seating to your living room. This hand-braided straw pouf can be used as a footrest, extra floor seat, or a small tray table. High-quality natural fiber.

title: Peel-and-Stick Herringbone Wallpaper
description: Get the high-end look without losing your security deposit. This self-adhesive, renter-friendly wallpaper removes cleanly without leaving sticky residue or damaging walls.

title: Set of 3 Ceramic Minimalist Vases
description: Display dried grass or fresh blooms in these matte finish ceramic vases. A stylish, contemporary accent for any bookshelf, mantle piece, or side table.

title: Warm Amber Glass Candle Warmer Lamp
description: Melt your favorite candles safely without an open flame. This elegant lamp uses a halogen light bulb to gently warm wax from the top down, filling the room with scent.
